title: Soulbound Enchant
description: Enchantment designed to keep your precious items and gear in your inventory after you die
body:
# Soulbound Equip your items with this enchantment so you don't lose them when you die! All tools, weapons and armor supported, included modded items. On top of that, you can put Soulbound on other essentials like boats, minecarts, shulker boxes, beds, and more! Items with durability will lose a percentage of it when returned to your inventory after a death. This value can be tweaked or even disabled in the included config. ##

Get a fast and affordable Minecraft server from BisectHosting! ###

**[Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/proxi?r=soulboundmodrinth)** provides the best quality Minecraft hosting at actually affordable prices. You can try it for a month, and if for some reason you don't like it, you can cancel the renewal with no penalties or fees. ##

Join the Discord server!

If you're having issues with something or have a suggestion to make, the Discord server is a great place to do it! You can also share your Minecraft build screenshots, send your best memes, talk with the community, and keep up to date with the latest and greatest information about what I'm working on for Minecraft. ## This mod is a semi-port of [Soulbound Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/mod/soulbound-enchantment) by [iMoonDay](https://modrinth.com/user/iMoonDay) kind of unintentionally. I was originally going to make a different type of enchantment, but I ended up using so much code from their original mod to learn how to make enchantments, do configs, Mod Menu support, and set up datagen, I figured it would be pointless to not just port the rest of the code to newer versions as well. If I get time, I'll port the NeoForge version over as well.
